title: neltuma mayana
intro: Neltuma mayana is a plant species, also known as Mayan cress or neltuma, which belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The medicinal properties of Neltuma mayana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Neltuma mayana include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and support immune function. Neltuma mayana can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, allowing for different methods of consumption to cater to individual needs.
